title: trisetum lasiorhachis
intro: Trisetum lasiorhachis, also known as the desert grass or long awn brome, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trisetum lasiorhachis include its ability to help soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
